chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1518 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 19.10.2016. Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chang, Advocate for the petitioner alongwith petitioner and her husband Altaf Hussain. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Ghulam Mustafa SHO P.S Nando on behalf of SSP Badin and ASI Buxian Khan on behalf of SHO P.S Badin. Respondents No.5 & 6 present in person. -.-.-. Petitioner’s counsel is present alongwith petitioner. Petitioner Mst. Fazeelan states that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Altaf Hussain out of her own freewill. Such fact has been verified by her husband Altaf Hussain, who is also present in person. When queried, he states that he is employed as a mechanic at some place and his education is up to matriculation. Learned A.A.G has filed Statements of official respondents No.2 to 4 (SSP Badin, SHOs Nindo and Badin) wherein they have stated that they are not siding with any party nor any case against the petitioner’s husband has been registered by them. Today, private respondent No.5 Fazal Hussain (the father of petitioner lady) and respondent No.6 Dr. Abdul Rasool (maternal uncle of petitioner lady) are also present, who have shown their intention to patch up the matter with the petitioner and her husband. In view of the above, the present petition is disposed of with a direction that above respondent No.6, being an educated person alongwith the petitioner’s counsel should make sincere efforts for reconciliation between petitioner, her husband and private respondents.

Abdul Rasool (maternal uncle of petitioner lady) are also present, who have shown their intention to patch up the matter with the petitioner and her husband. In view of the above, the present petition is disposed of with a direction that above respondent No.6, being an educated person alongwith the petitioner’s counsel should make sincere efforts for reconciliation between petitioner, her husband and private respondents. It is further directed that SHO P.S Badin will provide protection to the petitioner and her husband whenever he is approached with such a request. JUDGE Ali Haider
